validation_evidence.summary: 7 tests executed: 1 passed, 6 failed. Failures are assertion failures for missing schemaVersion, data, next, top-level error code/message/details, and missing required control-plane ERROR_CODES.
red_evidence: success envelope nests structured payload under data: actual undefined
success envelope includes an empty next action list by default: undefined !== []
failure envelope exposes stable code message details and next at the contract surface: top-level code/message/details/schemaVersion are undefined

required control-plane error codes are public contract codes: missing alias_conflict, duplicate_run, external_process, lock_busy, ownership_not_verified, port_release_timeout, project_has_active_runs, registry_lock_busy, run_not_found, start_in_progress, state_version_unsupported, task_lock_busy, unknown_process_owner
clean --all --json refuses without prompting and returns structured next actions: schemaVersion is undefined

recovery_guidance: Implement JSON envelope v1 in src/output.js with schemaVersion: 1, data payload nesting, and next defaulting to an array while preserving legacy top-level mirrored payload fields.
Move failure envelope code, message, details, and next to the top-level contract surface while preserving any legacy nested error compatibility required by older tests.
Add the required control-plane error codes to the public ERROR_CODES registry without removing legacy codes.
Add next actions for confirmation-required/refusal flows such as clean --all --json.
concerns: git status reports src/output.js and src/errors.js as untracked in this worktree view, but this lane only read those files and did not edit production source.

test_surfaces: clean --all --json CLI refusal path through createControlPlaneFixture
